from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a fluent sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping from predicate to a formatting lambda (subject, object) -> phrase
    predicate_map = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "height": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {o} meters tall",
        "weight": lambda s, o: f"{s} weighs {o}",
        "position": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays as a {o}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "currentclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "formerTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} formerly played for {o}",
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} competes in the {o}",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{s} is managed by {o}",
        "coach": lambda s, o: f"{s} is coached by {o}",
        "draftYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted in {o}",
        "draftRound": lambda s, o: f"{s} was selected in round {o}",
        "draftPick": lambda s, o: f"{s} was the {o}th pick",
        "playerNumber": lambda s, o: f"{s} wears number {o}",
        "currentteam": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "debutTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} debuted with {o}",
        # Additional predicates beyond the athlete domain
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"{o} is the leader of {s}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{s} is based in {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"{o} owns {s}",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f"{o} is the chairman of {s}",
        "generalManager": lambda s, o: f"{o} is the general manager of {s}",
        "stadium": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays at {o}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays at {o}",
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} competes in the {o}",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f"The anthem of {s} is {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"{s} has an ethnic group of {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"The language of {s} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency of {s} is {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"The demonym for {s} is {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded on {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"{s} covers an area of {o}",
        "utcOffset": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a UTC offset of {o}",
        "timeZone": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the {o} time zone",
        "season": lambda s, o: f"The season for {s} is {o}",
    }

    # Group triples by subject
    subject_groups = {}
    for t in triples:
        subject_groups.setdefault(t.subject, []).append(t)

    # Helper maps for primary clause and relative clauses
    primary_map = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "height": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {o} meters tall",
        "weight": lambda s, o: f"{s} weighs {o}",
        "position": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays as a {o}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "currentclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "formerTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} formerly played for {o}",
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} competes in the {o}",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{s} is managed by {o}",
        "coach": lambda s, o: f"{s} is coached by {o}",
        "draftYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted in {o}",
        "draftRound": lambda s, o: f"{s} was selected in round {o}",
        "draftPick": lambda s, o: f"{s} was the {o}th pick",
        "playerNumber": lambda s, o: f"{s} wears number {o}",
        "currentteam": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "debutTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} made his debut with {o}",
        "draftTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted by {o}",
        "youthclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} played youth football at {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"{s} is owned by {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{s} is based in {o}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays at {o}",
        "stadium": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays at {o}",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f"{s} is chaired by {o}",
        "generalManager": lambda s, o: f"{s} is managed by {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"{s} is led by {o}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in {o}",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f"The anthem of {s} is {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"{s} has an ethnic group of {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"The language of {s} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency of {s} is {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"The demonym for {s} is {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded on {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"{s} covers an area of {o}",
        "utcOffset": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a UTC offset of {o}",
        "timeZone": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the {o} time zone",
        "season": lambda s, o: f"The season for {s} is {o}",
    }

    relative_map = {
        "owner": lambda o: f"owned by {o}",
        "city": lambda o: f"based in {o}",
        "ground": lambda o: f"plays at {o}",
        "stadium": lambda o: f"plays at {o}",
        "league": lambda o: f"competes in the {o}",
        "manager": lambda o: f"managed by {o}",
        "coach": lambda o: f"coached by {o}",
        "formerTeam": lambda o: f"formerly played for {o}",
        "currentteam": lambda o: f"currently plays for {o}",
        "debutTeam": lambda o: f"made his debut with {o}",
        "draftTeam": lambda o: f"was drafted by {o}",
        "youthclub": lambda o: f"played youth football at {o}",
    }

    sentences = []
    for subj, triples_list in subject_groups.items():
        # Determine primary clause (prefer debutTeam, currentteam, club, etc.)
        primary = None
        primary_obj = None
        for t in triples_list:
            if t.predicate in {"debutTeam", "currentteam", "club", "currentclub", "formerTeam", "position", "birthDate", "birthYear", "birthPlace"}:
                primary = t.predicate
                primary_obj = t.object
                break
        if not primary:
            # fallback to first triple
            primary = triples_list[0].predicate
            primary_obj = triples_list[0].object

        primary_phrase = primary_map.get(primary, lambda s, o: f"{s} {primary} {o}")(subj, primary_obj)

        # Build relative clauses for the remaining predicates
        rel_clauses = []
        for t in triples_list:
            if t.predicate == primary:
                continue
            if t.predicate in relative_map:
                rel_clauses.append(relative_map[t.predicate](t.object))
            else:
                # generic fallback
                rel_clauses.append(f"{t.predicate} {t.object}")

        if rel_clauses:
            # join with commas and 'and' for the last
            if len(rel_clauses) == 1:
                clause = rel_clauses[0]
            else:
                clause = ", ".join(rel_clauses[:-1]) + f", and {rel_clauses[-1]}"
            sentence = f"{primary_phrase}, {clause}"
        else:
            sentence = primary_phrase

        sentences.append(sentence)

    # Combine subject sentences into a coherent paragraph
    if not sentences:
        return ""
    if len(sentences) == 1:
        return sentences[0] + "."
    # Use space separation for readability
    paragraph = " ".join(s.rstrip('.') + "." for s in sentences)
    return paragraph

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

      sentences = []
      for (subj, pred), objects in grouped.items():
          if pred in {"club", "currentclub"} and len(objects) > 1:
              # List multiple clubs
              objs = ", ".join(objects[:-1]) + f", and {objects[-1]}" if len(objects) > 2 else " an...
              phrase = f"{subj} plays for {objs}"

              phrase = predicate_map.get(pred, lambda s, o: f"{s} {pred} {o}")(subj, obj)
          sentences.append(phrase)

      return combined + "."
